effect.subject: ad_hoc_tints
effect.reserved_for: palette values or the specified tints only (40% campaign headline letters, 70% Light Blue callout, 30% Golden Sand callout, 70% wave top layers)

rule_text: No other ad-hoc tints are allowed — use palette values or only the specified tints (campaign headline letters ≈40%, Light Blue callout 70%, Golden Sand callout 30%, wave top layers 70% transparency).
intent: Prevent invented tints that dilute the palette system.
summary: color_application: Use only palette values or specified tints—campaign headline letters ≈40%, Light Blue callout 70%, Golden Sand callout 30%, wave top layers 70% transparency.
